---
title: "TITLE_HERE"
date: today
categories: [CATEGORY_HERE]
---

## Overview

Brief description of the topic.

## Key Concepts

### Definition 1
::: {.callout-note}
## Definition
Define key terms here.
:::

### Theorem 1
::: {.callout-important}
## Theorem
State the theorem here.

**Proof:** 
Proof goes here.
:::

## Examples

### Example 1
Work through a concrete example.

## Applications

How this applies to telecommunications/networking.

## References

- Source 1
- Source 2

---

*Related: [Link to related note]()*
